output.final_deliverable:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/History_of_Wikipedia
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia_the_free_encyclopedia

Verified adjacency: Wikipedia (URL 2) links to History of Wikipedia (URL 3) [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia#History].
output.action_summary: The chain starts at the Wikipedia Main Page, links to the Wikipedia article, which links to the History of Wikipedia, and then to the Wikipedia: The Free Encyclopedia page. The link from Wikipedia to the History of Wikipedia confirms the adjacency near the end.
